gdpr.title: Privacy Policy & GDPR
gdpr.subtitle: Information about how we process and protect your personal data.
gdpr.data_collection_text: We collect personal identification data (name, email, phone), business identification data (IČO, DIČ), bank details (IBAN), and work-related data necessary for providing our cleaning services.
gdpr.data_usage_text: Your data is used exclusively for: matching you with cleaning orders, processing payments, generating invoices, communicating service updates, and complying with Czech tax and labor regulations.
gdpr.data_rights_text: Under GDPR you have the right to access, correct, delete, or export your personal data at any time. Contact us at privacy@cleansia.cz.
gdpr.data_retention_text: We retain your data for the duration of your partnership and for the legally required period afterward (typically 10 years for tax documents under Czech law).
gdpr.contact_text: For any privacy-related questions, contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@cleansia.cz.
gdpr.export_description: Download a copy of all personal data we store about you as a JSON file.
gdpr.export_success: Your data export has been downloaded.
gdpr.export_error: We couldn't export your data. Try again later.
gdpr.consents_description: Review and change the consents you've given us.
gdpr.consent_error: We couldn't update your consent. The switch shows the saved state.
gdpr.delete_description: Permanently delete your account and anonymize your personal data. This cannot be undone.
gdpr.delete_confirm_message: Your account will be permanently deleted and your personal data anonymized. This cannot be undone.

orders.title: How Orders Work
orders.step1_desc: Find orders in your area that match your availability and skills.
orders.step2_desc: Claim an order to add it to your assignments. The customer is notified.
orders.step3_desc: Perform the cleaning, take before/after photos, and mark as complete.
orders.step4_desc: Your earnings are added to your next invoice for the pay period.

status.pending_desc: Order has been created but payment is not yet confirmed. Waiting for customer payment.
status.confirmed_desc: Payment received and order is confirmed. Available for employees to take.
status.in_progress_desc: An employee has started working on this order. Cleaning is underway.
status.completed_desc: Work is finished, photos uploaded. Ready for payment processing.
status.cancelled_desc: Order was cancelled. No payment or work required.

payment.pending_desc: Customer has not completed payment yet. Order cannot be confirmed until paid.
payment.paid_desc: Customer has paid successfully. Order can proceed to be taken by employees.
payment.failed_desc: Payment attempt failed. Customer needs to retry payment.
payment.refunded_desc: Payment was refunded to customer. Order may have been cancelled or disputed.

invoices.title: How Invoices Work
invoices.step1_desc: Complete orders during a pay period. Your earnings accumulate automatically.
invoices.step2_desc: At period end, an invoice is created with all your completed orders.
invoices.step3_desc: Admin reviews and approves your invoice. You'll see status updates here.
invoices.step4_desc: Once approved, payment is processed to your registered bank account.

status.pending_desc: Invoice has been generated and is waiting for admin review.
status.approved_desc: Admin has approved your invoice. Payment will be processed soon.
status.paid_desc: Payment has been sent to your bank account. Check your bank statement.
status.disputed_desc: There's an issue with the invoice. Admin will contact you for clarification.
status.rejected_desc: Invoice was rejected. Check notes from admin for required corrections.
status.cancelled_desc: Invoice was cancelled and will not be paid.
